rationale: The only change was employer names (re:cinq→Google, Optilyz→Meta, GISCollective→Amazon) with identical skills, roles, and accomplishments. The score dropped from 6 to 4 and a brand-new concern appeared — 'May have unrealistic salary expectations' — which has no basis in the resume content and is inferred purely from the prestige of the FAANG employer names. The seniority concern existed in both versions (merely reworded), so it is not the driver; the salary-expectation concern and the accompanying score drop key directly off the demographic/prestige signal of the company names, which carries no job-relevant change.
